name: fast_walk
summary: Train a fast, responsive gait that maximizes adherence to the commanded velocity, including aggressive directional changes. Tolerate jerkier actions if they buy tracking accuracy.
priorities: Fast response to velocity command changes
Strong foot_gait reward to maintain a clear, repeatable gait at speed
avoid: Over-penalizing action_rate to the point of sluggish response
Letting the body become so smooth that tracking suffers
notes: Some action_rate cost is acceptable. Falls or extreme tilts are still failures.
